common.allPromoCopied: All Promo Codes Copied to Clipboard
landing.title: NeuroCheck — Digital Checkup of Student's Learning Functions
landing.slogan: Helping to understand how attention, self-control, and memory work — in 15 minutes, without complex equipment and without specialists present.
landing.for-whom.title: For Whom
landing.for-whom.parents.title: Parents
landing.for-whom.parents.text: Who want to understand why learning is easy or difficult, and how to support the child.
landing.for-whom.teachers.title: Teachers and Schools
landing.for-whom.teachers.text: Who are looking for ways to improve the academic productivity of the class or individual students.
landing.for-whom.psychologists.title: Psychologists and Tutors
landing.for-whom.psychologists.text: Who use data on cognitive functions for individual work with children.
landing.how-it-works.title: How It Works
landing.how-it-works.description: Based on three scientifically validated tasks that study key mechanisms necessary for successful learning:
landing.how-it-works.attention.title: Attention
landing.how-it-works.attention.text: — the ability to concentrate and maintain focus.
landing.how-it-works.selfcontrol.title: Self-Control
landing.how-it-works.selfcontrol.text: — the ability to restrain impulses and act thoughtfully.
landing.how-it-works.memory.title: Working Memory
landing.how-it-works.memory.text: — the ability to retain and use information in the process of solving tasks.
landing.how-it-works.smalltext: Just 3 tasks of 2 minutes each, with short breaks between them. Everything is online, the child completes it independently.
landing.what-you-get.title: What You Get
landing.what-you-get.description: After completion, you will receive a PDF report that:
landing.what-you-get.item1: Clearly describes the child's strengths and areas for development.
landing.what-you-get.item2: Provides personalized recommendations for home and school:
landing.what-you-get.item2-1: how to organize the learning environment;
landing.what-you-get.item2-2: what exercises and games will help strengthen skills;
landing.what-you-get.item2-3: how to maintain motivation and attention.
landing.what-you-get.item3: Notes features to consider in learning and daily life.
landing.why-important.title: Why It's Important
landing.why-important.description: Academic success is directly linked to the quality of attention, self-control, and memory. Understanding these processes allows:
landing.why-important.parents.label: parents
landing.why-important.parents.text: to create comfortable learning conditions at home;
landing.why-important.teachers.label: teachers
landing.why-important.teachers.text: to interact more effectively with the student;
landing.why-important.specialists.label: specialists

gonogo.title: Go/No-Go Test (Self-Control)
gonogo.description: Testing self-control and impulse inhibition abilities
gonogo.instruction.title: Instructions:
gonogo.instruction.item1: Two blocks of 1 minute each: first with RIGHT hand, then with LEFT.
gonogo.hint: Green - press space | Red - do not press
gonogo.toast.start: First block with RIGHT hand (press space on green), then with LEFT hand
gonogo.completed.title: Test Completed!
gonogo.dev.diff-between-hands: Difference in mean reaction time between hands, ms

hand-switch.other-hand: Now please use the other hand
hand-switch.prepare-next: Get comfortable and prepare for the next test.
mobile-blocked.title: Test Not Available on Mobile Devices
mobile-blocked.description: Please open NeuroCheck on a tablet or computer for correct test completion.
mobile-blocked.reason: Our tests require stable gaze fixation and a large screen.
results.title: Test Results
results.fallbackDescription: Detailed report for your result combination is not yet available
results.errorDescription: Failed to reset session for development.
results.finalMessage:
🎉 **Great job, you're awesome!** 🌟
 
 Congratulations, you've completed **NeuroCheck**! It was an awesome adventure, and you nailed it 100%! 💪 Your efforts will help make learning even more fun and easier.
 
📬 **What's next?**\nWe'll send the results to your parents via email. Talk to them about how it went — they'll be thrilled to hear what a champion you are!
 
🚀 **Good luck in your studies!** Keep shining, and may every day bring new discoveries! If you want more ideas on how to learn with joy, check out our Telegram channel [**\"PROdetej | More Than Just Learning\"**](https://t.me/ennkki) with your parents.
 
**You're a star!** ✨
tcp.title: Attention Test (TCP)
tcp.instructions1: The test will take about 2 minutes. Russian and English letters will appear on the screen one after another.
tcp.instructions2: Each letter is shown for 1 second.
tcp.instructions3: Press SPACE only when you see the letter X
tcp.instructions4: Do not press space for other letters.
tcp.startDescription: Press space when you see the letter X
tcp.pressSpace: Press space if you see the letter X

timeCheck.subtitle: Testing is available only at certain times

timeCheck.unavailableSubtitle: The test is available only from 9:00 to 10:00 on weekdays (Monday - Friday)
timeCheck.tryLater: Try later during the allowed time
videoRest.title: Video Break
videoRest.subtitle: Watch the video to rest and restore concentration.
videoRest.enjoy: Enjoy the break. The button will unlock on timer
accessPage.title: Access to Testing
accessPage.subtitle: Choose a way to get access to NeuroCheck
accessPage.payment.title: Testing Payment
accessPage.payment.includes.title: What is included in the testing:
accessPage.promo.title: Promo Code
accessPage.promo.description: If you have a promo code, enter it below
accessPage.promo.label: Promo Code
accessPage.promo.note.text: The promo code provides free access to testing. If you don't have a promo code, you can purchase access via payment.
accessPage.consent.title: Consent to Personal Data Processing
accessPage.consent.description: By clicking "Pay" or "Apply Promo Code", I, as the Customer (parent or legal representative of the student), confirm that:
accessPage.consent.point1: I voluntarily provide IP Kunyavsky Yuri (hereinafter — Operator) with personal data (email, student's age, screening results) for the provision of the NeuroCheck service — digital checkup of student's learning functions, including conducting screening, forming a report, and sending recommendations.
accessPage.consent.point2: I agree to the processing, storage, systematization, use, and transfer (if necessary, with confidentiality) of my personal data in accordance with Federal Law of the Russian Federation No. 152-FZ "On Personal Data".
accessPage.consent.point3: I allow the processing of the student's data (age, test results), provided by me as a legal representative, for the purposes of forming a report and recommendations compliant with FGOS.
accessPage.consent.point4: I confirm that I have read the Privacy Policy and Public Offer on the site neurocheck.ru, and accept their terms.
accessPage.consent.point5: I consent to receiving informational messages (e.g., report, notifications about new features) to the specified email. I can withdraw this consent by writing to support@neurocheck.ru.
accessPage.consent.point6: I understand that the data is processed using secure technologies, stored for no more than 12 months (or other period specified in the Privacy Policy) and not transferred to third parties without my consent, except in cases provided by law.
accessPage.footer.contact: Have questions? Contact us by email: support@neurocheck.ru

privacyPolicy.title: Personal Data Processing Policy
privacyPolicy.section1.text: - The screening complies with FGOS requirements for assessing universal learning actions (ULA), in particular:
privacyPolicy.section1.item2: Cognitive ULA (working memory, attention, strategic thinking).
privacyPolicy.section2.text: - Results do not replace a diagnosis, but serve as a basis for:
privacyPolicy.section2.item4: Adapting the learning environment (visual aids, task breakdown, routine recommendations).
privacyPolicy.section3.text: - The tool has undergone internal validation in educational organizations: showed high correlation with behavioral indicators (distractibility, impulsivity, fidgetiness), assessed by teachers and psychologists (r = 0.68–0.79 on behavior scales).
privacyPolicy.section4.title: 5. Ethical and Methodological Transparency
privacyPolicy.section4.item1: All procedures are non-intrusive, non-invasive, standardized.
privacyPolicy.section4.item2: Reports are built on the "do no harm" principle: focus on resources, growth areas, recommendations, not deficits.
privacyPolicy.section4.item3: Use of age norms excludes pathologization of age features.
privacyPolicy.section4.item4: Provides for repeated diagnostics over time — to assess support effectiveness.
privacyPolicy.section5.title: Conclusion
privacyPolicy.section5.text1: This screening is not a surrogate test, but a validated tool for assessing cognitive prerequisites for successful learning, based on:
privacyPolicy.section5.text2: It is legitimate as a primary tool for identifying cognitive risks and can be integrated into the psychological-pedagogical support system alongside other screening methods (e.g., NEPSY Screening, BAKO-2, Tutor).
privacyPolicy.sources.title: Sources:
reportPage.title: NeuroCheck Completion Report
successPage.error.noClientId: Failed to find payment identifier. Please check your email for the test link.
successPage.timedOut: The testing link has been sent to your email. If you don't see the email, check your 'Spam' folder.

successPage.waitNote: This may take up to a minute.
validationPage.title: Justification of Validity and Legitimacy of the Learning Functions Screening Tool
neuro.emailModal.title: Enter Your Email
neuro.emailModal.description: This email is required for sending test results. We will not use it for other purposes.
neuro.parents.title: Guide for Parents
neuro.parents.whatIs.1: This is a screening, not a medical diagnosis.
neuro.parents.whatIs.2: We do not make diagnoses, but show areas of pride, development, and possible difficulties in learning.
neuro.parents.whatIs.3: The result is a report for you and teachers with specific recommendations.
neuro.parents.time: How much time will it take?
neuro.parents.time.2: There will be short cartoons between tests for rest.
neuro.parents.who.1: The child takes the screening themselves.
neuro.parents.who.2: Your help is only at the beginning: start the computer, check internet and quiet.
neuro.parents.who.3: Important: do not prompt during tasks.
neuro.parents.prepare.4: Before starting — go to the bathroom, drink water.
neuro.children.title: Guide for the Child
neuro.children.intro.1: This is not an exam or a test. You can't do it 'bad' or 'good' here.
neuro.children.intro.2: We're just checking how your attention and memory work.
neuro.children.what.1: You'll have three tasks on the computer.
neuro.children.what.2: One — press a key when you see a letter.
neuro.children.what.3: Second — press or not press in a game with pictures.
neuro.children.what.4: Third — remember pictures and arrange them in the right order later.
neuro.children.prepare.2: Make sure it's quiet, no distractions.
neuro.children.prepare.3: Check that everything works on the computer.
neuro.children.prepare.4: Drink water and go to the bathroom.
neuro.children.remember.3: The main thing — try and complete to the end.
neuro.timeBlocked.title: Testing Temporarily Unavailable
neuro.timeBlocked.text: We open the screening only in the morning — from 6 to 12 hours local time. At this time, children are more alert, attention is fresher, and results are more accurate.
neuro.timeBlocked.saveLink: Please save your unique test link and return at the specified time:
neuro.children.consentText: By clicking the button, you accept
memoryTest.title: Visual Working Memory Test
memoryTest.description: Testing the ability to remember and reproduce visual information
memoryTest.instructions.title: Instructions:
memoryTest.instructions.step1: {{count}} pictures will appear on the screen one by one (1.5 sec each). Remember the order.
memoryTest.instructions.step2: Then there will be a 2-minute distraction phase.
memoryTest.instructions.step3: After that, restore the order by dragging pictures into the empty cells at the top.
memoryTest.memorize.title: Memorize the Sequence
memoryTest.distract.title: Distraction Phase
memoryTest.reconstruct.title: Restore the Order
memoryTest.reconstruct.description: Drag cards from below into the cells above
memoryTest.complete.title: Test Completed!
report.fallback.title: Brief Report ({{summaryKey}})
report.fallback.note: Detailed report for this result combination is not yet available. Contact a specialist for personalized recommendations.
report.descriptions.attention.1: Support needed in developing attention stability
report.descriptions.control.3: Good level of self-control and reaction inhibition
report.descriptions.memory.1: Excellent visual memory and memorization ability
report.descriptions.memory.2: Good level of visual working memory
report.descriptions.memory.3: Visual memory developed below average level
report.descriptions.memory.4: Support needed in developing visual memory
